description: User clicks on the departure date input field to change the travel date.
frame_description: The user is viewing a list of travel schedules from Rome to Palermo on Rome2Rio.

description: A date picker calendar modal appears on the screen.
frame_description: A calendar overlay is visible over the search results.

description: User hovers the cursor over February 13th in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over a specific date in the calendar modal.

description: User selects February 13th as the new departure date.
frame_description: The user clicks the date, and the calendar begins to close.

description: The date picker closes and the schedule list updates with new results for the selected date.
frame_description: The results list refreshes to show travel options for February 13th.

description: User hovers over the first schedule card in the results list.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the top travel option (11h 44m - Direct).

description: User clicks on the first schedule card to view trip details.
frame_description: The user activates the first travel option to see more information.

description: The UI transitions to show the specific segments and details of the selected trip.
frame_description: A detailed view of the trip segments (train/bus) appears.

description: User scrolls down and then back up through the trip details panel.
frame_description: The content in the left-hand details panel moves vertically.

description: User clicks the back arrow button to return to the search results list.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Back' icon at the top of the details panel.

description: The UI transitions back to the main list of all schedules.
frame_description: The detailed trip view disappears, replaced by the full results list.

description: User hovers over the second schedule card in the list.
frame_description: The cursor moves to and stays over the second travel option (11h 30m - 1 change).

description: User clicks on the second schedule card to view its details.
frame_description: The user selects the second travel option.

description: UI updates to show details for the second trip option.
frame_description: The details panel updates with information for the second trip.

description: User scrolls through the details of the second trip.
frame_description: Vertical scrolling within the trip details section.

description: User clicks the back button to return to the results list.
frame_description: The user navigates back to the main list.

description: UI returns to the main results list.
frame_description: The results list is visible again.

description: User clicks the departure date field again.
frame_description: The user initiates another date change.

description: The calendar modal reappears.
frame_description: The date picker overlay is shown.

description: User clicks on another browser tab, navigating away from the Rome2Rio page.
frame_description: The user clicks a tab at the top of the browser window.

description: The screen content changes to show the recording session interface.
frame_description: The view switches to the 'sessions.astable.com' tab, showing an infinite mirror effect of the screen recording.
